历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 2821, 2329, 2264, 7350 (including an outlier from the Sino-foreign cooperative major group), and 1184 respectively. Excluding the 2024 special major group outlier, the overall trend shows a significant upward trajectory, with the 2025 baseline ranking at approximately 1184, an increase of about 1080 compared to 2023, reflecting the continuously growing attractiveness of this university among Physics Category candidates in Jiangxi Province. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jiangxi Province was 110 in 2021, 111 in 2022, 112 in 2023, 67 in 2024 (due to adjustments in new Gaokao major groups), and 67 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 71, a slight expansion of about 6% compared to 2025, leading to a modest increase in competition but with limited impact.
3. [University Level] Beijing Institute of Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has steadily risen from 19th in 2021 to 13th in 2025 and 14th in 2026, firmly placing it among the top-tier science and engineering universities in China, exerting a strong appeal to high-scoring candidates.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving public opinion incidents such as teacher ethics and style, but the university's response to public opinion has been relatively swift. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 47th (relatively hot), with moderate short video exposure, and overall attention is stable. No significant records of admission cut-off drops have been observed. The university boasts 12 A- or above disciplines, including Information and Communication Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Mechanical Engineering A, Materials Science and Engineering A, Optical Engineering A, etc., which are highly aligned with its enrollment majors, highlighting its outstanding engineering strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are all highly recommended hot majors, closely matching Beijing Institute of Technology's advantageous engineering directions. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Jiangxi Province is approximately 268,000 (estimated based on historical proportions), a slight increase compared to 2025, with the competitive environment remaining basically stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the continuous upward trend in historical rankings, the slight expansion of the enrollment plan in 2026, the extremely high university level with continuously rising rankings, and the somewhat negative but limited impact of reputation public opinion, on the basis of the 2025 baseline ranking of 1184, the minimum ranking for 2026 is predicted to be approximately 1226, with a range of 1103–1349. The most critical influencing factors are: ① The university's Soft Science ranking has continuously risen to 14th nationally, exerting a strong appeal to high-scoring candidates; ② The enrollment plan has slightly expanded by about 6%, leading to a modest increase in competition; ③ The advantageous engineering majors are highly aligned with current socially popular major directions, maintaining high application enthusiasm.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 1103), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were approximately 733, 776, 699, 913, and 860, fluctuating within the 700–920 range. The baseline for 2025 is about 860, with recent years showing stability.
2. [Enrollment Plan] The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Jiangxi was 8 in 2021, 7 in 2022, 7 in 2023, 31 in 2024 (significantly increased after the new Gaokao merged major groups), and 31 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 31, unchanged from 2025, indicating stable enrollment scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Institute of Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, ranked 14th nationally by Soft Science (2026). Although strong in science and engineering, as a top 985 university, it also has brand appeal for liberal arts students; in 2026, reputation is slightly negative due to teacher ethics incidents, but mainly affecting science and engineering directions; Douyin popularity ranks 47th (relatively hot), with overall moderate attention. No records of History Category admission cut-off breaks; related disciplines for History Category admissions include Law A-, Business Administration A-, Management Science and Engineering A, Applied Economics (not separately rated but strong), and the Social Sciences Experimental Class covers Law, Economics, Business Administration, etc.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major is socially recommended (relatively hot), Finance/Economics/Economics is divided and wait-and-see, Accounting/Finance/Auditing is recommended; Jiangxi Province in 2026 has approximately 207,000 History Category candidates (estimated based on history proportion), roughly unchanged from 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on stable fluctuations in historical rankings, unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, very high university level but limited liberal arts admission majors, on the 2025 baseline of 860, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 851, with a range of 765–937. The most critical influencing factors are: ① Enrollment plan remains unchanged at 31 for three consecutive years, stable supply-demand relationship; ② History Category only has two Social Sciences Experimental Class directions, limited major choices, small ranking fluctuations; ③ The top 985 university brand effect still has strong appeal for liberal arts candidates.
